response:
I want 10 weaknesses of Dell from 2023 and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:  
1. [Company name] experienced a decline in revenue or profitability compared to the previous year.  
2. [Company name] saw a decrease in earnings per share (EPS) during the year.  
3. [Company name] faced a decline in stock price relative to the previous year.  
4. [Company name] is heavily reliant on a single product or market.  
5. [Company name] increased its liabilities during the year.  
6. [Company name] reported lower production or output due to external factors.  
7. [Company name] has no organic products or offerings.  
8. [Company name] does not provide outdoor access for its products.  
9. [Company name] has a significant portion of its sales coming from a few large customers.  
10. [Company name] is facing legal or regulatory challenges.
